label: Mystery
outlineTemplate: Crime/disappearance → Investigation → Red herrings → True reveal
namingConvention: Names that could belong to anyone (suspicion on all)
pacingRules: Clues distributed evenly. 1 major clue per 3 chapters. False leads every 2 chapters
upgradeSystem: Evidence chain: Suspicion → Lead → Clue → Connection → Proof → Reveal
